## What does this PR add?

<!-- e.g. "A senior-level coroutines question on cancellation" -->

## Type

- [ ] New interview question
- [ ] New / updated topic
- [ ] Interview experience
- [ ] Blog post
- [ ] Fix / correction to existing content
- [ ] Site / code change

## Checklist

- [ ] One focused change per PR
- [ ] Frontmatter is filled in correctly (`topic` matches an existing topic id, valid `difficulty`, etc.)
- [ ] Content is accurate, current, and explains the *why*
- [ ] No individual interviewers named; no proprietary/NDA material
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
